pr_title: Strip whitespace from page handler params
pr_body: Trims the v query parameter in three sibling page handlers.
author: contributor

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
 def handler_1(request):
     value = request.GET.get('v', '')
-    return render(request, 'page_1.html', {'v': value})
+    cleaned = value.strip()
+    return render(request, 'page_1.html', {'v': cleaned})

@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
 def handler_2(request):
     value = request.GET.get('v', '')
-    return render(request, 'page_2.html', {'v': value})
+    cleaned = value.strip()
+    return render(request, 'page_2.html', {'v': cleaned})

@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
 def handler_3(request):
     value = request.GET.get('v', '')
-    return render(request, 'page_3.html', {'v': value})
+    cleaned = value.strip()
+    return render(request, 'page_3.html', {'v': cleaned})

triage: {"file_tiers": {"app/handler_1.py": "standard", "app/handler_2.py": "standard", "app/handler_3.py": "standard"}, "overall_risk": "low", "relevant_dimensions": ["code_quality"], "reasoning": "Three sibling handlers each trim one query param; routine standard-tier review, no security surface change."}
